page.title: Conferences
page.subtitle: Presentations and talks from academic conferences

presentations.title: Simulating Open Democracy: An Agent-Based Framework for Testing Deliberative Institutional Designs
presentations.description: Comparing deliberation engines in a shared argument-theoretic environment. Open-source simulation using LLM agents as synthetic citizens to test how different institutional rules impact democratic consensus.

presentations.title: The Conditional Activation Model: Uncovering Policy Demand Responses to AI-Driven Automation
presentations.description: A two-gate framework explaining when citizens translate automation risk information into policy demand. Pre-registered experiment (N = 901) with Bayesian finite mixture model. Maximum conditional effect d = 0.61 — 2.5× the unconditional ATE.
